title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura's three sons, Tarakaksha, Vidyunmali, and Kamalaksha, possess immense power. Shambuki discloses that they are engaged in rigorous penance to appease Brahma Deva and obtain a crucial boon. Will Brahma Deva grant their earnest request?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati are overwhelmed with eternal joy as Devi Swaroopa brings forth their son, Kartikeya, after receiving a boon from Lord Brahma. How will the divine couple's hearts swell with love when they cradle their newborn.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Ranganath and Vishalu strike gold when they find what they believe is a treasure map. Soon, they consult an astrologer for help.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal reunites with an old friend but struggles to remember his name. Soon, he comes up with a complex plan to uncover his friend's identity.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal decides to prove a point to Lalithamba and hires a thief to target her. However, his actions have unintended consequences.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal lands in trouble when an old man accuses him of giving him the wrong medication. Soon, he enlists Lalithamba's help to fix the situation.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: When Vishal orders Ranganath to buy her a saree, he goes through increasingly bizarre means to make quick money.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: When Vittal learns that he might be in danger, he hires a bodyguard. However, when the bodyguard turns out to be a woman, Lalithamba instantly becomes jealous.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vishalu and the others see a woman crying and decide to help her for some publicity. However, their decision brings them unexpected trouble.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: As per Janaki's suggestion, the family goes on a trip to the temple along with Niranjan. Coincidentally, CSP and his family also arrive at the same temple. CSP talks to Janaki in private and confesses that he really wanted to attend her wedding.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Rashmi, who is delighted to see Madhukar at the temple, introduces herself as Chandu Bargi's wife and talks to him in private. As Madhukar remembers his mother and gets emotional, Rashmi consoles him. Will he realise that Rashmi is his real mother?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Chandu is inquisitive to know about Janaki's conversation with CSP and asks her about the same. When she speaks highly about CSP, an annoyed Chandu asks her not to believe a word he speaks.

title: Madha Matthu Manasi
subTitle: Madha is in love with Manasi, but she has feelings for someone else. Soon, he helps her unite with her lover and also strives to save her from some goons.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Noticing some leftover food on a plate, Lalli asks the family to confess their mistakes. But unaware of what she is talking about, the family starts to spill all their secrets.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: When Silli and Lalithamba hear about Vittal's misfortune, they come up with a new plan. However, their plan lands Vittal in more trouble than it's worth.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: When NML's brother visits, he pays Lalithamba effusive compliments. However, his praise rubs Vittal the wrong way.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal's friends hear about his prized umbrella and decide to hunt it down. However, Lalithamba grows annoyed with the object and decides to give it away.

subTitle: Pandu is in for a roller-coaster ride when his controlling wife meets his equally dominant daughter-in-law.

subTitle: Maanya tries to protect Taamsi by throwing a Holi celebration. However, when Hukum arrives, he suddenly grows suspicious.

title: Jhansi Ki Rani
subTitle: A young Manu's life changes after marrying the maharaja of Jhansi. Later, she becomes a warrior queen, determined to combat British rule in India.

title: Jaganmathe
subTitle: Sakthi is blessed with powers from the Goddess JAGANMATHE. Adored by the villagers for her abilities, she has grown up under the strict watch of her sister, who is her total opposite. Her life takes a turn when she meets an atheist doctor.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: As Varun Vaibhav refuses to appear at the police station for questioning, Janaki suspects foul play by him. She gathers Niranjan's family members and explains to them the difficulties that they may face during the interrogation.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Afraid of getting caught, Varun Vaibhav visits Chandu's house and informs him about Sanjana's complaint against him.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Upon Lalli's disappointed return, Silli determines to uncover the source of her distress. Later, Silli calls Ranganath and discovers that Vishalu is also emotional for some reason.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Ranganath has reported the tragic death of Lalli in a plane crash. Later, Ranganath explains that Lalli, who was on her way to China to combat the coronavirus pandemic, tragically passed away.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Pandu is in for a roller-coaster ride when his controlling wife meets his equally dominant daughter-in-law.

title: Jhansi Ki Rani
subTitle: A young Manu's life changes after marrying the maharaja of Jhansi. Later, she becomes a warrior queen, determined to combat British rule in India.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: After going against Chandu's words, Janaki begins to investigate Varun Vaibhav. While informing him about Sanjana's complaint, she shows his wedding picture taken with Sanjana.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Upon Varun Vaibhav pleading innocence and requesting for help, Chandu calls Janaki and asks her to meet him. Next day, Janaki meets Chandu and he defends Varun Vaibhav.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura receives word of Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati's newborn and sets out to locate him. Meanwhile, Karthikeya engages in battle with Tarakasura's followers to demonstrate Lord Shiva's supremacy.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Shankachuda, having lost his men in the battle, extends an invitation to Kartikeya to confront Tarakasura. Will Kartikeya accept Shankachuda's challenge and face Tarakasura in battle?

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: When Jogging Jaya is threatened by two rowdies on the road, Pandu comes to her rescue by pretending to be her husband Boxer Balram. With the rowdies looking for revenge right outside Pandu's front door, how will the family escape this conundrum?

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: After getting scolded by Chaaru for asking money to eat Panipuri, Nimmi vows to work and earn her own money. With the help of Srihari, Nimmi applies for the post of a teacher in a local school.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Srimathi gives her ATM card and pin number to Srihari and Nimmi. An onlooker learns the pin number when Srihari shouts it out and steals the card when their attention is away. Will Srimathi realise the mistake of giving ATM card and pin to others?

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Punda runs into his college friend Anjali at the dry cleaners. They decide to recreate a game that they played in their college days and the winner would get the other person's bag.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Srimathi and Pandu go on a trip to Goa. After returning from the trip, Srimathi throws up and Punda calls the doctor. As per the report, it is revealed that Srimathi is pregnant which shocks the family. Is Srimathi really pregnant?

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: When the MLA candidates challenge Pandu to become an MLA for a day, he accepts their challenge. As per the stipulation, if Pandu wins he will be nominated as the election candidate.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Punda's friend Ramaswamy introduces his second wife as Punda's wife Uma to his first wife Parvathi, and she takes a picture of Punda and Uma together. Meanwhile, Chaaru and Parvathi become friends. Punda senses trouble and gets worried.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Despite his parents' reluctance, Anand decides to meet CSP for the kidnapping case. Gripped with fear, Anand's parents inform Chandu Bargi about Anand's plans. How will Chandu react to this news?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Chandu Bargi calls Anand aside to talk to him. He discusses the case Anand is planning to file against him and tries to talk him out of it. Can Chandu successfully convince Anand to drop the case?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Janaki decides to gift a saree to her in-laws and chooses an expensive saree. When she gives a cheque to her driver to draw the money, she learns that the balance in her joint account with Chandu Bargi is nil. Why is Janaki's account empty?

title: News
subTitle: Guru, a newspaper reporter, decides to investigate the authenticity behind the series of breaking news reported by a rival newspaper company.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal brags about his own machismo, unaware that a dangerous goon is listening. Soon, Vittal's words land him in grave trouble.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Lalithamba decides to take care of the birds in her community and keeps a feeder out for them. However, Lalithamba's luck changes when one of the birds gives her a present.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Lalithamba makes a public statement that strikes a nerve among men. Soon, groups of men gather outside her house in protest.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: When Vittal scolds Lalithamba for ruining all her lipsticks, Lalithamba decides to seek revenge against him.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Dolly, a stranger, arrives at Lalli and requests her to deliver ten lakh rupees to her aunt. Later, Vittal aims to impress Dolly but ends up delivering the money to the wrong address.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal is blaming the auto driver for missing a free Singapore trip due to lateness. Later, the auto driver challenges Vittal to become an auto driver for a day, promising to drive him for free if he wins.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: As Janaki refuses to obey his order, Chandu threatens to remove her as the investigating officer from the case. Feeling helpless and demoralised, Janaki returns home and informs Sanjana about the developments.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Fearing a protest by Mahila Sangha and its consequences, Chief Minister advises Chandu to allow Janaki to continue as investigating officer and he agrees. Janaki informs the news to Sanjana and interrogates her to gather evidence.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva chooses to partake in the feast sent by Nandi and the devotees instead of Kartikeya's offering, which disappoints Parvati. Later, Shiva becomes concerned when Kartikeya discovers their true relationship.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati, concerned about Kartikeya's decision to engage in battle against Tarakasura's sons, expresses her worry, prompting her to implore Shiva to ensure Kartikeya's safety from the impending danger. Will Lord Shiva come to his son's aid?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: Latika supports Abhimanyu's decision to convince the entire family for setting up his academy. Will Latika's words help Abhimanyu get him his family's trust?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: Ashutosh creates a scene by arriving home in an intoxicated state. Not only does he break the promise made to Latika, but also embarrasses the entire family. Will he face the consequences for his unacceptable behaviour?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: To make Ashutosh realise his mistake, Latika punishes herself at the hands of Kamini. But, the situation intensifies as Abhimanyu gets himself punished as well. Will their suffering convince Ashutosh to end his addiction once and for all?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: Sajjan reveals to Latika that Abhimanyu agreed to leave her for the sake of obtaining the loan. While Latika refuses to believe Sajjan, the latter decides to prove that he is telling the truth. Will his plan be successful?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: Abhimanyu is happy about getting the loan, meanwhile, Sajjan attempts to sabotage Latika and Abhimanyu's relationship. Latika find out about the deal that Abhimanyu has supposedly made with Sajjan. Did Abhimanyu really try to pawn Latika?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: A disheartened Latika leaves the house in order to stay with her parents. Furthermore, Abhimanyu notices her odd behaviour towards him. Will he uncover that she found out about his deal?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: As Abhimanyu seems curious about Latika's changed behaviour, Latika remains annoyed at Abhimanyu knowing the truth about the deal he made with Sajjan. Later, Abhimanyu reveals the news of getting the loan to Latika's father.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Unable to see Janaki in financial trouble, Niranjan lends her the money sent to him by his mother. While Janaki's immediate future is secure, this leaves Niranjan unable to pay back his debts. How will Niranjan manage himself now?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: When Madhukar arrives in Bangalore for a seminar, Rashmi sees him on the way and invites him home with Chandu's permission. Despite not wanting to, Chandu acts like a dependable person and builds trust with Madhukar.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: At Chanchala's insistence, Janaki considers getting her room's interior changed and meets the designer. At the time of payment, Janaki talks to Chandu hoping to draw some money for her needs.

subTitle: When Vittal disappoints the family by coming home empty-handed, Silli decides to seek her revenge against him.

subTitle: Lalithamba begins a new stint as a vigilante to punish thieves in her neighbourhood. However, Lalithamba's plan backfires when she receives a complaint about Vittal.
